zh.lifeSummary: David Barclay是David Barclay和Agatha Barclay的兒子，於大約1294年出生在蘇格蘭費伏。他於1330年之前與Margaret Brechin結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年1月25日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏可希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: David Barclay是David Barclay和Agatha Barclay的儿子，于大约1294年出生在苏格兰費伏。他于1330年之前与Margaret Brechin结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1350年1月25日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年57岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏可希。

nameMeanings.name: Barclay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Barkley
meanings: English and northern Irish (Antrim): variant of   Barclay  .
Americanized form of German   Berkel   or of some other similar (like-sounding) German surname.

variants.name: Barclift
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Scottish   Barclay  .

variants.name: Berkeley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Brickley
meanings: English and Irish: metathesized form of   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: David Barclay was born about 1294, in Fife, Scotland as the son of David Barclay and Agatha Barclay. He married Margaret Brechin before 1330. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 January 1350, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Creich, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: David Barclay est né environ 1294, à Fife, Écosse, fils de David Barclay et Agatha Barclay. Il a épousé Margaret Brechin avant 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1350, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Creich, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: David Barclay wurde um 1294 in Fife, Scotland, als Sohn von David Barclay und Agatha Barclay geboren. Er hat vor 1330 Margaret Brechin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1350 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Creich, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: David Barclay è nato il circa 1294 nel Fife, Scotland come figlio di David Barclay e Agatha Barclay. Lui sposato Margaret Brechin prima del 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1350, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Creich, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: David Barclayは約1294年にスコットランドフィフでDavid BarclayとAgatha Barclayの息子として生まれた。1330年以前にMargaret Brechinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年1月25日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで57歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフクレイチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Barclay(은)는 대략 1294년 스컷랜드 피프에서 David Barclay(와)과 Agatha Barclay의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1330년 이전 Margaret Brechin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 1월 25일 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 크레이치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: David Barclay nasceu aproximadamente 1294, em Fife, Scotland filho de David Barclay e Agatha Barclay. Ele casou-se com Margaret Brechin antes 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1350, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Creich, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: David Barclay родился около 1294 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. Его родителей звали David Barclay и Agatha Barclay. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Brechin перед 1330 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 января 1350 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности краич, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: David Barclay nació aproximadamente 1294, en Fife, Scotland como hijo de David Barclay y Agatha Barclay. Se casó con Margaret Brechin antes de 1330. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1350, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Creich, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
